citations.narrative:
The licensee acquired two male Savannah cats for exhibition, but did not use APHIS Form 7005 to record and maintain
their information as required by 2.75(a)(1). The Record of Acquisition and Dogs and Cats on Hand (APHIS Form 7005) is
necessary in order to accurately track animals being used in regulated activities and to ensure all required acquisition
information is documented and available to the APHIS inspector. Each dealer or exhibitor shall use the Record of
Acquisition and Dogs and Cats on Hand (APHIS 7005) and Record of Disposition of Dogs and Cats (APHIS 7006) to
make, keep, and maintain the required information. Correct by ensuring all required information is fully and correctly
documented on an APHIS Form 7005 and 7006, or by obtaining a variance.
Correct by: May 15th, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee and facility representatives.
n

narrative:
2.75(a)(2) 
   
Records: Dealers and exhibitors. 
The licensee acquired two male Savannah cats for exhibition, but did not use APHIS Form 7005 to record and maintain 
their information as required by 2.75(a)(1). The Record of Acquisition and Dogs and Cats on Hand (APHIS Form 7005) is 
necessary in order to accurately track animals being used in regulated activities and to ensure all required acquisition 
information is documented and available to the APHIS inspector. Each dealer or exhibitor shall use the Record of 
Acquisition and Dogs and Cats on Hand (APHIS 7005) and Record of Disposition of Dogs and Cats (APHIS 7006) to 
make, keep, and maintain the required information. Correct by ensuring all required information is fully and correctly 
documented on an APHIS Form 7005 and 7006, or by obtaining a variance.  
Correct by: May 15th, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee and facility representatives.
